title: たとえタブーに触れても

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've had a truly awful day. After trying to stick to
my guns a little too stubbornly, I ended up really
upsetting one of my colleagues.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling guilty and exhausted, I decide to visit an
izakaya bar but end up going overboard and
completely incapacitate myself with drink.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing I can do but dimly watch as
passersby give me a wide berth and hurry along.
Just when I begin to feel completely at a loss...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, someone's had a few too many. Are you
okay? Can you stand?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Aren't you a trainer from the academy?
What happened?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You don't actually think you can fool me
with that, do you?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Let's get you somewhere safe. But first, I'll go buy
you some water! Hang tight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her kindness and the alcohol loosen my tongue,
and I wind up telling her everything that
happened while she takes care of me.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
So you figured you'd drink your problems away,
huh? You've had a rough day!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
You regret not handling your feelings in a more
productive way? Hm... I mean, I get it.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
But I really do understand where you're coming
from. I'm one to go with my feelings, too.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I always want to be true to myself, but I always
end up losing myself instead...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh! I have to get going!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
What are you going to do? Are you going to rest
here, or do you want me to call you a taxi?
choice_data_list: I'm gonna wait till my head clears up.
Yeah, I should get a taxi and head home soon.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
All right. Well, I do have to leave, but... Make
sure you don't pass out here, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Haha, okay. I'll stick around until the taxi comes.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hello? I'd like to request a taxi...
